subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, through pen and ink, is befitting and meet unto the Most Sacred and Most Holy Court of Him Who is the Desired One, from the Point of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از قلم و مداد ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست که از نقطه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
